put.summary: Force an actuator to a manual state
put.description: Creates or replaces the manual override on this actuator (controller spec §10). The forced value is used until the override is cleared or its TTL expires — a timeout so a forgotten override cannot strand the greenhouse. For the per-zone `irrigation_valve`, `zone_id` selects the zone. A `level_pct` outside 0–100 (or a non-null `level_pct` on a pure on/off actuator) is rejected with 422. The override cannot suppress a safety interlock.

200.description: The active override after applying the request.

delete.description: Removes the override and returns the actuator to its control loop (controller spec §10). For the per-zone `irrigation_valve`, pass `zone_id` to select the zone.
